rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE FULLER VS. SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 03, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC, DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges each cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ ET AL VS. LEANA PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 03, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs LEANA PEREZ and FRANCISCO ARMAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Demurrer to the first cause of action for declaratory relief is sustained without leave to amend. Issues, for which Plaintiff is seeking declaratory relief have been the subject of the Rent Board proceeding and decision which is currently being challenged in action CPF-16-515041. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HUI WU ET AL VS. SEAN MCKEAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 03, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT SEAN MCKEAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Notice provides necessary and required information regarding relocation fees. = (501/GD)
